mapper.sql: id, user_id, parent_id, catalog_code, catalog_name, catalog_scope, balance_direction, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM asset_catalog WHERE status = 'ENABLED' AND (catalog_scope = 'SYSTEM' OR user_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY COALESCE(parent_id, id), parent_id IS NOT NULL, sort_order, id
SELECT FROM asset_catalog WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'ENABLED' AND (catalog_scope = 'SYSTEM' OR user_id = #{userId})
SELECT FROM asset_catalog WHERE catalog_code = #{catalogCode} AND catalog_scope = 'SYSTEM' LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM asset_catalog WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND status = 'ENABLED' AND (catalog_scope = 'SYSTEM' OR user_id = #{userId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO asset_catalog (user_id, parent_id, catalog_code, catalog_name, catalog_scope, balance_direction, sort_order, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{parentId}, #{catalogCode}, #{catalogName}, #{catalogScope}, #{balanceDirection}, #{sortOrder}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE asset_catalog SET parent_id = #{parentId}, catalog_name = #{catalogName}, balance_direction = #{balanceDirection}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND catalog_scope = 'USER'
